testcase.name: test_02_profit_summary_returns_correct_account_value

failure.message: AssertionError: total_withdrawals field missing assert 'total_withdrawals' in {'account_value': 18941.87, 'is_licensee': False, 'license_type': None, 'performance_rate': 94.13, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_47_lot_size_fixes.py:66: in test_02_profit_summary_returns_correct_account_value assert "total_withdrawals" in data, "total_withdrawals field missing" E AssertionError: total_withdrawals field missing E assert 'total_withdrawals' in {'account_value': 18941.87, 'is_licensee': False, 'license_type': None, 'performance_rate': 94.13, ...}

testcase.name: test_06_calculate_exit_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_47_lot_size_fixes.py:208: in test_06_calculate_exit_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to calculate exit: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to calculate exit: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","lot_size"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
